chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 826 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.994/2025 (C/A) 26.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Qadeer Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ishfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General along with Abdul Nasir Khokhar, Chief Post Master, GPO, Sukkur on behalf of Contemnor No.1. >>>>>..<<<<< Compliance report has been filed by learned Assistant Attorney General, same is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Perusal of the compliance report reflects that the order of this Court dated 30.11.2023 has been complied with. No case for initiating contempt proceedings is made out. Accordingly, the listed application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
